title: Borukva Food
description: Server side food, new crops and food
body:
# Borukva Food

**Borukva Food** is a Minecraft mod that expands the culinary experience by introducing a variety of new crops, foods, cooking tools, and more. Embark on a gastronomic adventure as you cultivate fresh ingredients, prepare delicious meals, and discover unique culinary delights.

[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/discord-label?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=%23ffffff&labelColor=%237289da&color=%237289da&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2FrgT62cvHNQ)](https://discord.gg/4nZYz3a4KE)

![main image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a9e91f760a3504815109648cd6c5a302c40eefd.jpeg)

## Features

<details>
  <summary>New Crops</summary>

- **Tomato:** A juicy and versatile ingredient for salads, sauces, and sandwiches.
- **Cabbage:** A leafy vegetable perfect for soups, stews, and slaws.
- **Corn:** A staple grain that can be enjoyed roasted, popped, or ground into flour.
- **Chili Pepper:** A spicy addition to dishes, adding a fiery kick.
- **Lettuce:** A refreshing leafy green for salads and wraps.
- **Cucumber:** A cool and hydrating vegetable, great for salads and pickles.
- **Onion:** A pungent bulb that adds depth and flavor to various recipes.
- **Rice:** A staple grain used in various dishes like sushi and pilaf.
- **Nether wheat:** А special type of wheat that grows in the Nether.

</details>

<details>
  <summary>Cooking Tools</summary>

- **Stove:** A heat source for cooking various ingredients, requiring fuel to operate.
- **Pan:** Used on top of the stove to fry foods.
- **Cutting Board:** A cutting board for chopping and preparing ingredients.
- **Pot:** Used for boiling, stewing, and making soups.

</details>

<details>
  <summary>Food Items</summary>

- **Ice Cream (Regular and Chocolate):** Sweet and refreshing treats to cool down.
- **Cookies (Sweet Berry and Blackcurrant):** Delightful baked goods for a satisfying snack.
- **Sandwiches (Beef and Tomato):** Hearty and flavorful options for a quick meal.
- **Borsch:** A traditional Ukrainian beet soup, providing strength and nourishment.
- **Broth:** A simple and savory soup, perfect for a light meal.
- **Rotten Soup:** A concoction brewed from undesirable ingredients, with questionable effects.
- **Barbecue (Beef and Vegan):** Grilled skewers of meat or vegetables for a smoky delight.
- **Fruit Pies (Lemon, Apple, Honey):** Sweet and flaky pastries filled with delicious fruit.
- **Pickles:** Tangy and crunchy cucumbers preserved in a jar.
- **Candies (Apple, Honey, Jack, Pumpkin, Lemon):** Assorted sugary treats to satisfy your sweet tooth.
- **Popcorn (Regular, Salt, Cheese, Chocolate):** A light and crunchy snack, available in various flavors.
- **Boiled Corn**
- **Butter**
- **Shawarma:** A flavorful wrap filled with meat, vegetables, and sauce.
- **Salads (Beef and Vegetable):** Refreshing and healthy options for a lighter meal.
- **Cakes (Chocolate and Honey):** Sweet and celebratory cakes for special occasions.
- **Pizzas (Meat and Vegan)**
- **Bowl of Rice**
- **Salmon Sushi (Maki, Nigiri, Uramaki)**
- **Onigiri**
- **Salo**
  
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Other Additions</summary>

- **Fertilizer:** Enhances the fertility and reducing acidity of farmland.
- **Compost:** Rises both fertility and acidity of farmland.
- **Soil Analyzer:** A tool to analyze the fertility and acidity of farmland.
- **Lemon and Avocado Trees:** New tree types yielding lemons and avocados.
- **Trades:** New trading options with wandering traders, offering lemon saplings for emeralds.

</details>

<details>
  <summary>Enhancements</summary>

- **Improved Farmland:** Enhanced farmland mechanics with fertility and acidity levels, affecting crop growth.
- **Composting:** Expanded composting options with new compostable items.

</details>

## Contribution

Feel free to contribute and add your own content! If you have any questions join or [discord](https://discord.gg/4nZYz3a4KE)!

(if someone can do a better sound design, please reach me)

Huge thanks to [Drex](https://modrinth.com/user/DrexHD)(development), [Motschen](https://modrinth.com/user/Motschen)(development, translation) and [HuiYa](https://github.com/dev-huiya)(translation)
